name: Tomato & Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 Green onions, cut into 2-inch lengths (separate whites from tops)
2 medium Tomatoes, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into thin slices and combine with 1 tablespoon teriyaki baste & glaze. Let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
3. Add garlic and ginger; cook until fragrant.
4. Add chicken and whites of green onions; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes, green onion tops, and the remaining 3 tablespoons teriyaki baste & glaze. Cook, stirring, until vegetables are thoroughly heated and coated with glaze.
